label: High confidence
evidence_strength: Multiple independent SMS Level 4 or 5 studies
generalisability: Findings replicated across settings or contexts
description: Decision-grade evidence; suitable for scaling and policy commitment

label: Medium confidence
evidence_strength: At least one SMS Level 3 or 4 study
generalisability: Findings established in one or a few settings
description: Indicative evidence; supports continued investment with monitoring

label: Low confidence
evidence_strength: SMS Level 1 or 2 only, or conflicting Level 3+ studies
methodological_quality: Weak; selection bias and confounding plausible
generalisability: Findings not yet established beyond original setting
description: Exploratory evidence; further evaluation needed before scaling
